title: tanacetum armenum
intro: Tanacetum armenum, also known as Armenian tansy or Tansy, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum armenum include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Tanacetum armenum include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
